section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports limited range of motion on extension of the arm.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Limited range of motion is typically a physical exam finding; phrased as a patient report here, but could mislead a reader about whether it was actually examined.

section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor palpated the patient's elbow.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is correctly in the Objective section as part of the physical exam; however, it is somewhat redundant documentation of the maneuver rather than the finding. No change of section needed.
